items.line_en: Every day, gun violence impacts communities all over the United States.

coach.say: Every day, gun violence impacts communities all over the United States.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Every day, / gun violence impacts communities all over the United States.

items.line_en: Here in California, you can help prevent these tragedies by requesting a gun violence restraining order for GVRO.

coach.say: Here in California, you can help prevent these tragedies by requesting a gun violence restraining order for GVRO.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here in California, / you can help prevent these tragedies by requesting a gun violence restraining order for GVRO.

items.line_en: Step 1. Identify a loved one in crisis or an individual at risk of dangerous behavior.

coach.say: Step 1. Identify a loved one in crisis or an individual at risk of dangerous behavior.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Step 1. / Identify a loved one in crisis or an individual at risk of dangerous behavior.

items.line_en: Step 2. Contact your local county clerk or local law enforcement to start the GVRO process.

coach.say: Step 2. Contact your local county clerk or local law enforcement to start the GVRO process.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Step 2. / Contact your local county clerk or local law enforcement to start the GVRO process.

items.line_en: Step 3. A preliminary hearing is held. If the judge finds the individual you identified is a threat to themselves or others,

coach.say: Step 3. A preliminary hearing is held. If the judge finds the individual you identified is a threat to themselves or others,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Step 3. / A preliminary hearing is held. / If the judge finds the individual you identified is a threat to themselves or others,

items.line_en: the court may issue a temporary 21-day GVRO. The individual in crisis will not be permitted to possess or purchase guns during this time.

coach.say: the court may issue a temporary 21-day GVRO. The individual in crisis will not be permitted to possess or purchase guns during this time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: the court may issue a temporary 21-day GVRO. / The individual in crisis will not be permitted to possess or purchase guns during this time.

items.line_en: Step 4. A second hearing will be held. The individual in crisis may attend the hearing. If necessary, the judge will extend the GVRO up to one year.

coach.say: Step 4. A second hearing will be held. The individual in crisis may attend the hearing. If necessary, the judge will extend the GVRO up to one year.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Step 4. A second hearing will be held. / The individual in crisis may attend the hearing. If necessary, the judge will extend the GVRO up to one year.

items.line_en: The individual can seek help for their at risk behavior and could request to terminate the GVRO if they no longer pose a threat.

coach.say: The individual can seek help for their at risk behavior and could request to terminate the GVRO if they no longer pose a threat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The individual can seek help for their at risk behavior and could request to terminate the GVRO if / they no longer pose a threat.

items.line_en: If they still pose a risk of danger, there could be a petition for another one-year GVRO.

coach.say: If they still pose a risk of danger, there could be a petition for another one-year GVRO.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If they still pose a risk of danger, / there could be a petition for another one-year GVRO.

items.line_en: For more information on the GVRO and how to request an application, visit speakforsafety.org.

coach.say: For more information on the GVRO and how to request an application, visit speakforsafety.org.
coach.hint: Chunk it: For more information on the GVRO and how to request an application, / visit speakforsafety.org.

items.line_en: This website does not provide legal advice and information is intended for general informational purposes only.

coach.say: This website does not provide legal advice and information is intended for general informational purposes only.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This website does not provide legal advice and / information is intended for general informational purposes only.

items.line_en: If you need any legal advice, please contact an attorney directly.

coach.say: If you need any legal advice, please contact an attorney directly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you need any legal advice, / please contact an attorney directly.
